title: Saudiarabian Fry Cucumber Delight
description: A refreshing and spicy Middle Eastern-inspired dish combining the crunch of cucumber with the savory flavor of fried ingredients.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the crushed fry and cook until golden brown, about 3 minutes.
Add the chopped resinous and cook for another minute.
Add the sliced cucumber and cook until slightly softened, about 2 minutes.
Add the broken chewy pieces and stir well.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
